features.title: Phone search on order form
features.description: Type a phone number while creating an order — matching customers appear instantly and auto-fill all fields.

features.title: Customer list
features.description: Users with the VIEW_CUSTOMERS permission can now browse and search all customers from the sidebar.

features.title: Export customers to Excel
features.description: Authorised users can download the full customer list as a multi-sheet Excel file, organised by year.
